title: OmniFormatter Miscellaneous / Legacy Languages Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for Solidity, GDScript, AutoHotkey, AutoIt, COBOL, Fortran, Assembly, Ada, Pascal, MATLAB, TCL, VBScript, ActionScript, and others.

solidity__pragmaVersion.description: [Solidity] Pragma version string. Must be the first line of each .sol file.

solidity__natspecComments.description: [Solidity] Require NatSpec (/// or /**) documentation on public/external functions.

gdscript__indentationSpaces.description: [GDScript] Spaces per indentation level. GDScript uses significant whitespace.

cobol__verbCase.description: [COBOL] Case for COBOL verbs and keywords.

fortran__caseStyle.description: [Fortran] Modern Fortran convention is lowercase keywords.

ada__namingConvention.description: [Ada] Ada is case-insensitive; MixedCase (CamelCase) for identifiers is convention.

matlab__suppressOutput.description: [MATLAB] Add semicolons at end of statements to suppress console output.
